ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was employed */,
  "position" TEXT /* Current position of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hiring manager */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Employee's salary */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Employee's benefits (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., Home, Office, Temporary) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary address for the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the address became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the address ceased to be effective */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the address is the current address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the action was performed on */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Edit, Remove, Assign) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "action_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the department is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Department's budget */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Department's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Department's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Location's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Location's email address */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Manager, Supervisor, HR Staff) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is a default role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the permission is a default permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the action type is a default action type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the action type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose record was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the action was reversed */,
  "reversed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reversed the action */,
  "reversed_date" TEXT /* Date the action was reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is sent to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification is important */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
